summary: Dhammapada — broad ethical-psychological backbone (Buddhism rescue from 1 source)
description:
**Parent:** Corpus Expansion Tier 1 (child 8 of 8)

## Source

- **Translator / license:** Max Müller, SBE10, 1881. US-PD.
- **URL:** index https://www.sacred-texts.com/bud/sbe10/index.htm
- **Structure:** chapters `sbe1003.htm` (Ch I) … `sbe1028.htm` (Ch XXVI) = 26 sub-pages, each with in-line numbered verses ("1. All that we are…").
  - `sbe1002` = intro (exclude)
  - `sbe1029+` = the separate Sutta-Nipata (exclude — outside Dhammapada)
- **Format:** Two viable shapes:
  - `html_multi` with an allowlist of `sbe1003..sbe1028` only — requires either a filter feature in the downloader or per-chapter entries.
  - 26 per-chapter `html` entries with ids like `dhammapada-chapter-01..26` — matches the Yasna / Upanishads / Republic precedent. **Recommended.**
- **Chunking:** `page-as-chunk` per chapter is simplest. For finer grain, `regex-section-split` on `^\s*(\d+)\.\s` within each chapter (per-verse).

## SBE downloader note

SBE source — same Footnotes pre_strip note as Heart Sutra (child 7). Once 5a794b5e patch is the default, the pre_strip becomes a no-op.

## Concept payload

Broad ethical-psychological backbone — `meditation`, craving, impermanence, the path. Aphoristic register pairs with the Tao Te Ching and Golden Verses already held.

## Ref

`docs/corpus-expansion-candidates.md` §3.8
